docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGE, DUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIALE, JEFF $3,660.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,745.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS AN AWARD OF STATORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2440.00 DUE TO DEFENDANTS FAILURE TO COMPLY CIVIL CODE SEC. 195.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,220.00 FILED BY PAGE, DUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT VIALE, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, DUSTIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF THROUGH COURT CALL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED MAY-06-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VIALE, JEFF
PLAINTIFF STILL REQUESTS COURT RULING ON HIS REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FOR 6-12-14 HEARING DATE. SC-150 FORM MAILED BACK TO DEFENDANT THIS DATE

PLAINTIFF CONTACTED BY TELPHONE THIS DATE IN RESPONSE TO HIS CALL. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT SC-150/REQUEST TO POSTPONE REQUIRES A FEE TO FILE. ADVISED PLAINTIFF THAT DEFENDANT HAS BEEN SERVED. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT HE WISHED TO WITHDRAW HIS REQUEST
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.
